tree.name: Jamal Murray
tree.note: Guard from Kentucky, drafted 7th overall by Denver. Selected with the 2016 1st round pick acquired from NYK in the Carmelo Anthony 3-team trade (Feb 22, 2011).

assetsGivenUp.name: Carmelo Anthony
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (DEN/NYK/MIN): DEN traded Carmelo Anthony, Chauncey Billups, Renaldo Balkman, Anthony Carter, Shelden Williams, and a 2016 1st (Jakob Poeltl #9) to NYK. DEN traded a 2015 2nd (Richaun Holmes) to MIN. NYK sent Wilson Chandler, Raymond Felton, Danilo Gallinari, Timofey Mozgov, cash, a 2012 2nd (Quincy Miller), a 2013 2nd (Romero Osby), a 2014 1st (Dario Saric), and a 2016 1st (#7, became Jamal Murray) to DEN. MIN sent Kosta Koufos to DEN. NYK also sent Eddy Curry, Anthony Randolph, and cash to MIN. DEN acquired right to swap 2016 1st-round picks with NYK.
assetsGivenUp.note: Franchise star drafted #3 in 2003. Traded to NYK in blockbuster 3-team deal. The 2016 1st from NYK became Jamal Murray.
